name: Blueberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, 3 tablespoons of sugar, and melted margarine. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese with 3/4 cup of sugar until well blended.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
8. Loosen the edges of the cake from the pan's rim, then cool completely before removing the rim from the pan.
9. Chill the cheesecake before topping with blueberry pie filling and serving.
